data.content: Plan review approved. The decomposition matches the code paths that need to change: knot_hot schema/cache, create and update event emission, rehydration and sync application, queued CLI write plumbing, KnotView/prompt/show rendering, and the foolery knots.ts plus knots-backend bridge. The legacy compatibility fallback in toBeat() is the right migration strategy and the test plan covers native field reads, legacy note fallback, precedence, and round-trip behavior. Implementation note: keep knot-level acceptance clearly distinguished from the existing profile-level prompt acceptance section so execution prompts do not end up with two ambiguous headings.
